package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for fmt_hot_path: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: fmt formatting calls such as Sprintf inside loops.
type CaseFmtHotPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFmtHotPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFmtHotPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFmtHotPathModel
}

type CaseFmtHotPathService struct {
    repo *CaseFmtHotPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFmtHotPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeFmtHotPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFmtHotPathDTO) error {
    focus := "fmt_hot_path"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    var b strings.Builder
    b.WriteString(input)
    b.WriteString(strconv.Itoa(len(items)))
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    fmt_hot_path_negative := map[string]int{"fmt": 1, "hot": 2, "path": 3}
    fmt_hot_path_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    fmt_negative_0 := fmt_hot_path_negative["fmt"] + len(input)
    _ = fmt_negative_0
    hot_negative_1 := fmt_hot_path_negative["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_negative_1
    path_negative_2 := fmt_hot_path_negative["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_negative_2
    return nil
}
